content:
Women’s Programs

The Edmonton Squash Club often holds women-specific programs and events, both for experienced players and beginners. The dates and themes change often, so it’s a good idea to either join the Women’s event email list or keep an eye on our calendar to see what’s coming up.

Check out below for the upcoming drop-in dates!

Upcoming Women’s Programs
